become_driver_desc: Weewandiise okuba omuwereza w'entambula okusobola okutandika okufuna emirimu gy'okutuusa ebintu.
add_vehicle_desc: Olina okuwandiisa ekidduka nga tonnatandika kufuna mirimu gy'okutuusa ebintu.
no_jobs: Tewali mirimu gya kutuusa bintu kaakati.
driver_verification_required: Olina okumaliriza okukakasibwa nga tonnafuna mirimu.

verify_driver.title: Kakasa Obusobozi Bwo Okuvvuunyisa
verify_driver.description: Olina okumaliriza okukakasibwa kwa NIDA n'olayisensi y'okuvvuunyisa nga tonnafuna mirimu gy'okutuusa bintu. Okukakasibwa kwa TRA ne LATRA okw'ekidduka kyo kukolebwa mu njawulo, buli kidduka, okuva ku "Ebidduka Byange".
verify_driver.already_verified: Okakasiddwa - osobola okufuna emirimu gy'okutuusa ebintu.
verify_driver.at_least_one_required: Jjuza namba ya kukakasibwa emu okumala.

request_service.title: Saba Okutuusa Ebintu
request_service.created: Okusaba kwo okw'entambula kutuumiddwa - tunoonya dereeva.
request_service.verification_required: Olina okukakasa endowooza yo nga tonnasaba obuweereza buno.
request_service.no_quotes: Londa ekifo eky'okukwata n'eky'okutuusa okulaba emisolo.

vehicle_types.tuk_tuk: Tuk Tuk / Ebintu ku Bugaali bwa Magulu Asatu (okutuuka ku tonne 1)
vehicle_types.public_transport: Taxi Ntambula (paseli entono, okutuuka ku kilo 25 / km 60)
vehicle_types.bus: Bbaasi (paseli entono, okutuuka ku kilo 30, olugendo luwanvu)

register.title: Weewandiise nga Dereeva oba Kkampuni y'Entambula
register.country_hint: Kino kye kisalawo obuyinza (TRA/LATRA, NTSA, URSB, n'ebirala) obugenda okukozesebwa okukukakasa ggwe n'ebidduka byo.
register.step2_desc: Kino kye kirabika eri bakasitoma nga bagattiddwa ne dereeva ow'ebintu byabwe.
register.driver_required_fields: Jjuza erinnya lyo ne namba y'olayisensi.
register.driver_register_failed: Okutereka ebikwata ku buvvuunyisi bwo kulemye.
register.step3_desc: Ekidduka kino kigenda kugattibwa naawe otomatiki nga dereeva waakyo.
register.latra_placeholder: Si bwetaavu - ku bidduka ebikozesebwa mu busuubuzi
register.next_step_verify: Ekifuuvu ekiddako: kakasa NIDA yo n'olayisensi y'okuvvuunyisa, oluvannyuma okakase buli kidduka (TRA/LATRA) wammanga, nga tonnafuna mirimu.
register.confirm_unbond: Okakasa nti oyagala okuggya ekidduka kino ku pulofayiro yo? Tojja kufuna mirimu gyakyo okutuusa lw'onoddamu okukigattira.
register.unbonded: Ekidduka kino kiggiddwawo ku pulofayiro yo.
register.vehicle_verified: Ekidduka kikakasiddwa - kaakati kisobola okufuna mirimu.
register.vehicle_verify_pending_or_failed: Okukakasibwa tekunnamala - kebera nnamba ze wayingizza oluvannyuma oddemu ogezeeko.
